ddls:
CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "mun_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the municipality */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the municipality */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the municipality is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the municipality is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the municipality is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mun_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "cat_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "cat_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., job applicants, job vacancies, employment rates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "cat_id" TEXT /* Category identifier for the data */,
  "val" INTEGER /* Value of the employment statistic */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the employment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mun_id", "yr", "cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_rates" (
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year of the employment rate */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of employment in the municipality */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of unemployment in the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mun_id", "yr")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of job seekers */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of job seekers */,
  "job_seekers" INTEGER /* Number of job seekers in the demographic category */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of job seekers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_mun_id FOREIGN KEY ("mun_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("mun_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_vacancies" (
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job vacancy entry */,
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year of the vacancy report */,
  "total_vacancies" INTEGER /* Total number of job vacancies reported */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_vacancies_mun_id FOREIGN KEY ("mun_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("mun_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mun_id FOREIGN KEY ("mun_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("mun_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of analysis */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend or insight derived from data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the employment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_mun_id FOREIGN KEY ("mun_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("mun_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection entry */,
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Projected year of employment statistic */,
  "projected_value" INTEGER /* Projected value of job applicants */,
  "projection_method" TEXT /* Method used for projection (e.g., linear regression, time series analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_projections_mun_id FOREIGN KEY ("mun_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("mun_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy becomes effective */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., labor market policy, education policy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual report, quarterly report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "submitted_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., feature request, bug report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government agency, research institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_mart" (
  "data_mart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data mart entry */,
  "mun_id" TEXT /* Municipality identifier */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "cat_id" TEXT /* Category identifier for the data */,
  "val" INTEGER /* Value of the employment statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_mart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_mart_mun_id FOREIGN KEY ("mun_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("mun_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_mart_cat_id FOREIGN KEY ("cat_id") REFERENCES categories ("cat_id")
)
